! ========================================================================
! L1-05: 内部発熱テスト（基本機能テスト）
! ========================================================================

TITLE
	L1-05 Internal Heat Gain Test ;

GDAT
	FILE w=tokyo_3column_SI.has ;
	RUN (1/1) 1/1-1/7 ;
	PRINT 1/1-1/7 *wd ;
*

EXSRF
	r=0.2 ;
	south a=0.0 ;
	north a=180.0 ;
	east  a=90.0 ;
	west  a=270.0 ;
	Hor ;
	earth Z=1.5 ;
*

WALL
	-E:ExtWall  RC-150 FPS-50 GPB-12 ;
	-R:Roof     FPS-100 GPB-12 ;
	-F:Floor    GPB-12 FPS-100 RC-150 ;
*

WINDOW
	SouthWindow  t=0.65 B=0.15 R=0.50 ;
*

ROOM
	TestRoom  Vol=100.0
		*s
		*q
		alc=4.6

		south: -E 15.5 ;
			-W SouthWindow 4.5 ;
		north: -E 20.0 ;
		east:  -E 12.5 ;
		west:  -E 12.5 ;

		Hor:   -R 40.0 ;
		earth: -F 40.0 ;
	*
*

APPL
	TestRoom
		L=(100,x,LightSchedule)
		As=(50,30,ApplianceSchedule) ;

	%s -v LightSchedule 800-(1.0)-1800 ;
	%s -v ApplianceSchedule 0-(0.5)-2400 ;
*

EQPCAT
	BOI testboi Qo=5000 eff=0.85 ;
*

SYSCMP
	Boiler1 -c testboi ;
*

SYSPTH
	HeatPath -sys A -f W
		> (0.01) Boiler1 > ;
*
*
